description: Merkle Row-Map examples demonstrating CBOR canonicalization (RFC 8949) with RFC-6962 domain separation for Merkle tree computation

empty_map.note: Empty tree root = H(0x00 || "") - RFC-6962 style

single_entry.note: Leaf hash = H(0x00 || cbor_canonical({k, v})) - RFC-6962 style

multiple_entries.note: Parent hash = H(0x01 || left || right), odd nodes promoted upward - RFC-6962 style

order_independence.description: Demonstrates order independence (BTreeMap maintains sorted order)
order_independence.note: BTreeMap maintains sorted key order, so insertion order doesn't affect root
